plugins.name: dotnet

plugins.name: dotnet-ai
plugins.description: AI and ML skills for .NET: technology selection, LLM integration, agentic workflows, and RAG pipelines.

plugins.description: ASP.NET Core web development skills including middleware, endpoints, and API patterns.

plugins.description: Skills for Blazor development: component authoring, interactivity, and web application patterns.

plugins.name: dotnet-data
plugins.description: Skills for .NET data access and Entity Framework related tasks.

plugins.name: dotnet-diag
plugins.description: Skills for .NET performance investigations, debugging, and incident analysis.

plugins.name: dotnet-experimental

plugins.name: dotnet-maui
plugins.description: Skills for .NET MAUI development: environment setup, diagnostics, layout, and theming.

plugins.name: dotnet-msbuild
plugins.description: Comprehensive MSBuild and .NET build skills: failure diagnosis, performance optimization, and modernization.

plugins.name: dotnet-nuget
plugins.description: NuGet and .NET package management: dependency management and modernization.

plugins.name: dotnet-template-engine
plugins.description: Skills for template discovery, project scaffolding, and template authoring.

plugins.name: dotnet-test
plugins.description: Skills for running, diagnosing, and migrating .NET tests.

plugins.name: dotnet-upgrade

plugins.name: dotnet-11
